# Project Instructions

Use this file to share guidance for contributors and AI assistants.

## Coding Guidelines

- Keep solutions simple and readable.
- Add comments only when logic is not obvious.
- Prefer small, focused methods.
- Preserve existing project structure.

## Java Conventions

- Use meaningful class and method names.
- Follow standard Java formatting.
- Keep `main` methods minimal; move logic into helper methods when needed.

## Testing and Validation

- Build and run locally before committing.
- For behavior changes, add or update tests.
- Avoid introducing breaking changes unless explicitly requested.

## Pull Request Notes

- Describe what changed and why.
- Include verification steps.
- Mention known limitations or follow-ups.
